name: Ultimate Chocolate Chip Cookies and Variations
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 8 to 13 Minutes
Note: If nuts are omitted, use 1 1/2 cups semi-sweet chocolate chips.
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla until smooth. Beat in the egg.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, salt, and baking soda. Gradually add this mixture to the creamed ingredients, stirring until combined. Stir in chocolate chips and pecans (or additional chocolate chips).
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
5. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes (chewy cookies will appear light and moist - do not overbake), or 11-13 minutes (crispier cookies). Let cool on the sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack. Makes about 3 dozen 3-inch cookies.
Variations:
1. Drizzle: Melt semi-sweet or white chocolate with Butter Flavor Crisco at very low heat or microwave power level. If too thick, thin with additional Crisco. Drizzle over cooled cookies and sprinkle with nuts before the chocolate sets.
2. Chocolate Dipped: Melt chocolate chips or melting chocolate with Crisco until smooth. Dip one side of cooled cookie, then sprinkle with chopped nuts before the chocolate hardens. Place on wax paper.
3. Holiday Dress-Ups: Frost with Creamy Vanilla Frosting (see recipe below) and decorate with red and green candy-coated chocolate pieces like M&Ms.
Creamy Vanilla Frosting:
1/2 cup Butter Flavor Crisco
1 pound (4 cups) Confectioners' sugar
2 tablespoons Milk
1 teaspoon Vanilla
Combine all ingredients in a medium bowl. Mix until well blended, then beat on high speed for 2 minutes until smooth and creamy. Apply to cooled cookies.
